prompt_template:
Decompose into subtasks:
"Build a real-time collaborative text editor with WebSocket sync, operational transform, user presence, and version history."
Output JSON tree.

scoring.expected_tree: {"task": "Build collaborative text editor", "subtasks": [{"task": "Design document model and OT algorithm", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Implement WebSocket server", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Build text editor UI component", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Implement operational transform engine", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Add user presence system", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Implement version history storage", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Add conflict resolution", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Build version diff viewer", "subtasks": []}, {"task": "Write integration tests", "subtasks": []}]}
